definitions.text: To move, shift, provide something abstract or concrete to someone or something or somewhere. To transfer one's possession or holding of (something) to (someone).
examples: I gave my coat to the beggar.

definitions.text: To transfer one's possession or holding of (something) to (someone).
examples: I gave my coat to the beggar.

definitions.text: To make a present or gift of.
examples: I'm going to give my wife a necklace for her birthday.
She gave a pair of shoes to her husband for their anniversary.

definitions.text: The amount of bending that something undergoes when a force is applied to it; a tendency to yield under pressure; resilience.
examples: This chair doesn't have much give.
There is no give in his dogmatic religious beliefs.
